entities.name: cOrder
entities.hqlWhereClause: e.salesTransaction=true AND e.transactionDocument.return= false AND e.transactionDocument.sOSubType NOT LIKE 'OB'

derivation.source: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(Line),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM C_OrderLine WHERE C_Order_ID=@C_Order_ID@
SELECT C_BPartner_ID AS DefaultValue FROM C_Order WHERE C_Order_ID=@C_Order_ID@
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(LINE),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM C_ORDERLINETAX WHERE C_ORDERLINE_ID=@C_OrderLine_ID@
SELECT C_BPartner_ID AS DefaultValue FROM C_Order WHERE C_Order_ID=@C_Order_ID@
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(Line),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM C_OrderLine WHERE C_Order_ID=@C_Order_ID@
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(LINE),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM C_ORDER_DISCOUNT WHERE C_ORDER_ID=@C_ORDER_ID@
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(LINE),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM C_ORDERTAX WHERE C_Order_ID=@C_Order_ID@

rules.name: SE_Order_Organization
rules.description: When organization changes, determines available warehouses and sets default, calculates Cash VAT flag, applies document type rules based on BP and SOTrx context, generates next document number.

rules.name: SL_Order_DocType
rules.description: When document type changes, updates document number sequencing, sets payment/invoice/delivery rules based on subtype and BP preferences, handles quotation-to-order transition by appending quotation reference to description.

rules.name: SL_Order_UpdateLinesDate
rules.description: Warning-only callout. Detects date changes at header level and displays a warning prompting users to consider updating order line dates. Does not modify data.

rules.name: SL_Order_UpdateLinesDate
rules.description: Warning-only callout. Detects date changes at header level and displays a warning prompting users to consider updating order line dates. Does not modify data.

rules.name: SL_Order_PriceList
rules.description: When price list changes, copies the price list's currency and tax-inclusion flag to the order header.

rules.name: SE_Order_BPartner
rules.description: When a business partner is selected, populates price list, warehouse, sales rep, invoice rule, payment rule, delivery rule, payment term, bill-to location, and contact details. Shows warning if partner is blocked or credit limit exceeded.

rules.name: SL_Charge
rules.description: When a charge is selected, retrieves the standard amount for that charge and auto-populates the charge amount field.

rules.name: SE_Order_BPartnerLocation
rules.description: When BP location changes, determines whether the organization uses Cash VAT accounting based on SOTrx type, org, BP, and location.

rules.name: SE_Order_Project
rules.decisionJustification: Projects will be supported but should not condition invoicing/payment rules
rules.description: When a project is selected, retrieves the project's default payment rule and payment term and populates them on the order header.

rules.name: SL_Order_Product
rules.description: When product is selected on a line, populates UOM, net/gross unit prices, price list/limit/standard prices, discount percentage, attribute set instance, and applicable tax. Handles both net and gross price models.

rules.name: SL_Order_Amt
rules.description: Heavyweight callout triggered by 9 fields. Recalculates line amounts, unit prices, discounts, and tax base. Enforces price limits, checks stock availability, handles net/gross price models, triggers quantity-change hooks for custom pricing rules.

rules.name: SL_Order_Amt
rules.description: Heavyweight callout triggered by 9 fields. Recalculates line amounts, unit prices, discounts, and tax base. Enforces price limits, checks stock availability, handles net/gross price models, triggers quantity-change hooks for custom pricing rules.

rules.name: SL_Order_Amt
rules.description: Heavyweight callout triggered by 9 fields. Recalculates line amounts, unit prices, discounts, and tax base. Enforces price limits, checks stock availability, handles net/gross price models, triggers quantity-change hooks for custom pricing rules.

rules.name: SL_Order_Amt
rules.description: Heavyweight callout triggered by 9 fields. Recalculates line amounts, unit prices, discounts, and tax base. Enforces price limits, checks stock availability, handles net/gross price models, triggers quantity-change hooks for custom pricing rules.

rules.name: SL_Order_Charge_Tax
rules.description: Retrieves charge amount from charge master and determines applicable tax based on location and order context. Populates both charge amount and tax fields.

rules.name: SL_Order_Tax
rules.description: Looks up the appropriate tax for the product based on order date, org location, warehouse, and partner billing/delivery location. Validates that org has a location configured.

rules.name: SL_Order_Amt
rules.description: Heavyweight callout triggered by 9 fields. Recalculates line amounts, unit prices, discounts, and tax base. Enforces price limits, checks stock availability, handles net/gross price models, triggers quantity-change hooks for custom pricing rules.

rules.name: SL_Order_Amt
rules.description: Heavyweight callout triggered by 9 fields. Recalculates line amounts, unit prices, discounts, and tax base. Enforces price limits, checks stock availability, handles net/gross price models, triggers quantity-change hooks for custom pricing rules.

rules.name: SL_Order_Amt
rules.description: Heavyweight callout triggered by 9 fields. Recalculates line amounts, unit prices, discounts, and tax base. Enforces price limits, checks stock availability, handles net/gross price models, triggers quantity-change hooks for custom pricing rules.

rules.name: SL_Order_Conversion
rules.description: Converts alternate UOM quantities to base quantity using conversion rates. Manages relationship between secondary UOM and primary ordered quantity, clearing one if the other is blank.

rules.name: SL_Order_Conversion
rules.description: Converts alternate UOM quantities to base quantity using conversion rates. Manages relationship between secondary UOM and primary ordered quantity, clearing one if the other is blank.

rules.name: SL_Order_Amt
rules.description: Heavyweight callout triggered by 9 fields. Recalculates line amounts, unit prices, discounts, and tax base. Enforces price limits, checks stock availability, handles net/gross price models, triggers quantity-change hooks for custom pricing rules.

rules.name: OperativeQuantity_To_BaseQuantity
rules.description: Converts alternate UOM quantity to base unit quantity using UOMUtil service. Updates the appropriate quantity field depending on window context (sales orders, purchase orders, shipments, invoices).

rules.name: OperativeQuantity_To_BaseQuantity
rules.description: Converts alternate UOM quantity to base unit quantity using UOMUtil service. Updates the appropriate quantity field depending on window context (sales orders, purchase orders, shipments, invoices).

rules.name: SL_Order_Amt
rules.description: Heavyweight callout triggered by 9 fields. Recalculates line amounts, unit prices, discounts, and tax base. Enforces price limits, checks stock availability, handles net/gross price models, triggers quantity-change hooks for custom pricing rules.

rules.name: AD_Org (without *)
rules.description: Framework security validation. Filters organizations to show only those accessible by the current user's client and org context. Excludes summary orgs.

rules.name: C_DocType PO/SO
rules.code:
C_DocType.DocBaseType IN ('SOO', 'POO') AND C_DocType.IsSOTrx='@IsSOTrx@'
AND (AD_ISORGINCLUDED(@AD_Org_ID@,C_DocType.AD_Org_ID, @#AD_Client_ID@) <> '-1' OR COALESCE(@AD_Org_ID@,'-1')='-1')
AND COALESCE(@isReturnMaterial@, 'N') = C_DocType.IsReturn
AND ((@isQuotation@='Y' AND docsubtypeso like 'OB') OR ((@isQuotation@='N' OR @isQuotation@ is null) AND (docsubtypeso is null OR docsubtypeso not like 'OB')))
rules.description: Filters document types to show only Sales Order or Purchase Order types matching the current SOTrx flag, within the organization tree, matching return/quotation status.

rules.name: AD_User - Org Tree
rules.autoRationale: Validation rule filters dropdown options; essential for data integrity

rules.name: C_BPartner Location - Bill To
rules.autoRationale: Validation rule filters dropdown options; essential for data integrity

rules.name: Invoice Rules for POS Sales orders
rules.code: (AD_Ref_List.value IN ('I', 'D', 'O') OR (SELECT DOCSUBTYPESO FROM C_DOCTYPE WHERE C_DOCTYPE.C_DOCTYPE_ID = @C_DOCTYPETARGET_ID@) <> 'WR')
rules.autoRationale: Validation rule filters dropdown options; essential for data integrity

rules.name: Price List isSOTrx
rules.description: Filters price lists to show only sales or purchase price lists depending on the SOTrx flag.

rules.name: AD_User C_BPartner User/Contacts
rules.autoRationale: Validation rule filters dropdown options; essential for data integrity

rules.name: C_BPartner Location - Ship To
rules.description: Filters BP locations to show only active ship-to addresses for the selected business partner.

rules.name: C_Project based on status and bpartner
rules.code: C_Project.projectstatus in ('OP', 'OR') and (C_Project.c_bpartner_id=@C_BPartner_ID@ or '@IsSOTrx@'='N') or C_Project.c_project_id = @c_project_id@
rules.autoRationale: Validation rule filters dropdown options; essential for data integrity

rules.name: AD_User C_BPartner User/Contacts Drop
rules.autoRationale: Validation rule filters dropdown options; essential for data integrity

rules.name: C_BPartner Location - Drop Ship To
rules.autoRationale: Validation rule filters dropdown options; essential for data integrity

rules.name: C_BPartner Location - Ship To
rules.description: Filters BP locations to show only active ship-to addresses for the selected business partner.

rules.name: FIN_PaymentMethodsWithAccountIsSOTrxControl
rules.code:
EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM FIN_FinAcc_PaymentMethod fapm WHERE FIN_PaymentMethod.FIN_PaymentMethod_ID=fapm.FIN_PaymentMethod_ID
AND fapm.Payin_Allow = (SELECT CASE WHEN '@IsSOTrx@'='Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE fapm.Payin_Allow END FROM DUAL)
AND fapm.Payout_Allow = (SELECT CASE WHEN '@IsSOTrx@'='N' THEN 'Y' ELSE fapm.Payout_Allow END FROM DUAL))
rules.description: Filters payment methods to show only those configured to allow pay-in (for sales) or pay-out (for purchases) based on the SOTrx flag.

rules.name: Return reason RFC/RTV
rules.code: (C_RETURN_REASON.ISRFC = @ISSOTRX@ OR C_RETURN_REASON.ISRTV=(case when @ISSOTRX@='N' then 'Y' else 'N' end))
rules.autoRationale: Validation rule filters dropdown options; essential for data integrity

rules.name: AD_Org show child organizations
rules.code: AD_ISORGINCLUDED(ad_org.ad_org_id, CASE WHEN (@Parent_AD_Org@ IS NULL OR @Parent_AD_Org@ = '') THEN @AD_ORG_ID@ ELSE @Parent_AD_Org@ END, ad_org.ad_client_id)<>-1 AND IsReady='Y'
rules.description: Framework security validation. Filters organizations to show only those accessible by the current user's client and org context. Excludes summary orgs.

rules.name: C_Tax_IsSOTrx_Date
rules.code: C_TAX.VALIDFROM<=COALESCE(@DateInvoiced@,@DateOrdered@) AND (C_TAX.SOPOTYPE =(CASE WHEN @IsSOTrx@ = 'Y' THEN 'S' ELSE 'P' END) OR C_TAX.SOPOTYPE = 'B') AND C_TAX.AD_CLIENT_ID=@AD_CLIENT_ID@ AND C_TAX.C_TAX_ID=(CASE WHEN @IsSOTrx@ = 'Y' AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM AD_ORGINFO WHERE ISTAXUNDEDUCTABLE='Y' AND AD_ORG_ID=@AD_ORG_ID@) THEN (SELECT C_TAX_ID FROM AD_ORGINFO WHERE ISTAXUNDEDUCTABLE='Y' AND AD_ORG_ID=@AD_ORG_ID@) ELSE C_TAX.C_TAX_ID END)
rules.description: Filters taxes by validity date, sales/purchase type, client, and special handling for organizations with undeductable tax configuration.

rules.name: C_BPartner Location - Ship To
rules.description: Filters BP locations to show only active ship-to addresses for the selected business partner.

rules.name: Return reason RFC/RTV
rules.code: (C_RETURN_REASON.ISRFC = @ISSOTRX@ OR C_RETURN_REASON.ISRTV=(case when @ISSOTRX@='N' then 'Y' else 'N' end))
rules.autoRationale: Validation rule filters dropdown options; essential for data integrity

rules.name: UOM Validation
rules.code: td0.c_uom_id IN(select p.c_uom_id from m_product p where p.m_product_id = @M_Product_ID@) or td0.c_uom_id IN(select a.c_uom_id from m_product_aum a where a.m_product_id = @M_Product_ID@ and ((@IsSOTrx@ = 'Y' and a.sales <> 'NA') OR (@IsSOTrx@ <> 'Y' and a.purchase <> 'NA')))
rules.autoRationale: Validation rule filters dropdown options; essential for data integrity

rules.name: AD_Client Security validation
rules.autoRationale: Validation rule filters dropdown options; essential for data integrity

rules.name: AD_Org Security validation
rules.code: (@AD_Client_ID@='0' AND AD_Org.AD_Org_ID='0') OR (@AD_Client_ID@!='0' AND ((AD_Org.AD_Client_ID IN (@#User_Client@) AND AD_Org.AD_Org_ID IN (@#User_Org@)) OR AD_Org.AD_Org_ID='0' AND AD_Org.IsSummary='N'))
rules.description: Framework security validation. Filters organizations to show only those accessible by the current user's client and org context. Excludes summary orgs.

rules.name: AD_Client Security validation
rules.autoRationale: Validation rule filters dropdown options; essential for data integrity

rules.name: Calculate Promotions
rules.description: Evaluates and applies promotional discounts and offers defined in the system to the order lines based on products, quantities, business partner, and order date.

rules.name: Change Debt Payment
rules.autoRationale: Process supports core order workflow

rules.name: Copy Lines
rules.description: Copies order lines from selected source orders into the target order. Applies hook-based transformations at each stage (product/qty/attributes/prices/taxes). Auto-explodes non-stocked BOM products into component lines.

rules.name: Copy Product Template
rules.autoRationale: Process supports core order workflow

rules.name: Create Invoice
rules.autoRationale: Process supports core order workflow

rules.name: Create Order
rules.autoRationale: Process supports core order workflow

rules.name: Explode
rules.autoRationale: Process supports core order workflow

rules.name: Insert Orphan Line
rules.autoRationale: Process supports core order workflow

rules.name: Process Order
rules.description: Handles order document action processing: Complete, Void, Reactivate. Manages status transitions, inventory reservations, and financial impact. Includes pre/post-process hooks and validates BP currency before completion.

rules.name: Process Order
rules.description: Handles order document action processing: Complete, Void, Reactivate. Manages status transitions, inventory reservations, and financial impact. Includes pre/post-process hooks and validates BP currency before completion.

rules.name: Update Payment Plan
rules.autoRationale: Process supports core order workflow

rules.name: RM_ReceiveMaterials
rules.autoRationale: Process supports core order workflow

rules.name: Add Payment
rules.description: Processes payments for orders by allocating amounts to payment schedule details. Handles overpayments as credits/refunds, applies GL item allocations. Creates FIN_PaymentDetail records linked to FIN_PaymentScheduleDetails.

rules.name: Cancel and Replace Sales Order
rules.description: Creates a replacement order for an existing completed order. Validates source is a standard SO (not work/purchase order), creates new order in temporal status via CancelAndReplaceUtils, navigates to the new order.

rules.name: Confirm Cancel and Replace Sales Order
rules.autoRationale: Matches honeypot omit pattern; not essential for MVP

rules.name: Copy from Orders
rules.autoRationale: Process supports core order workflow

rules.name: Create Purchase Order Lines
rules.autoRationale: Process supports core order workflow

rules.name: Manage Prereservation Pick and Edit
rules.autoRationale: Process supports core order workflow

rules.name: Manage Reservation Pick and Edit
rules.autoRationale: Process supports core order workflow

rules.name: Post
rules.description: Posts or unposts accounting entries for the order. Generates GL entries via ActionButtonUtility.processButton() or reverses them via resetAccounting(). Supports batch processing with per-record commit/rollback.

rules.name: RFC/RTV HQL Pick and Edit Lines
rules.autoRationale: Process supports core order workflow

rules.name: RFC/RTV HQL Pick and Edit Lines
rules.autoRationale: Process supports core order workflow

rules.name: Service Order Line Relation Pick and Edit
rules.autoRationale: Process supports core order workflow

rules.name: Print orders process
rules.autoRationale: Process supports core order workflow

auxiliaryInputs.name: APRM_OrderIsPaid
auxiliaryInputs.code:
@SQL=select case when ps.outstandingamt <> 0 then 'N' else 'Y' end
          from fin_payment_scheduledetail fpsd
              join fin_payment_detail fpd on fpsd.fin_payment_detail_id=fpd.fin_payment_detail_id
              join fin_payment fp on fpd.fin_payment_id=fp.fin_payment_id
              join fin_payment_schedule ps ON ps.fin_payment_schedule_id = fpsd.fin_payment_schedule_order
              join c_order co on co.c_order_id=ps.c_order_id
                WHERE ps.c_order_id =@c_order_id@
                and to_number(aprm_seqnumberpaymentstatus(fp.status)) >= 40
                group by co.GrandTotal, ps.outstandingamt, ps.c_order_id

auxiliaryInputs.name: PromotionsDefined
auxiliaryInputs.code: @SQL=select case when count(*) = 0 then 'N' else 'Y' end from m_offer where isactive='Y' and ad_client_id = @AD_Client_ID@

auxiliaryInputs.name: showAddPayment
auxiliaryInputs.code:
@SQL=select case when sum(fpsd.amount)=co.GrandTotal then 'N' else 'Y' end
          from fin_payment_scheduledetail fpsd
              join fin_payment_detail fpd on fpsd.fin_payment_detail_id=fpd.fin_payment_detail_id
              join fin_payment fp on fpd.fin_payment_id=fp.fin_payment_id
              join fin_payment_schedule ps ON ps.fin_payment_schedule_id = fpsd.fin_payment_schedule_order
              join c_order co on co.c_order_id=ps.c_order_id
                WHERE ps.c_order_id =@c_order_id@
                and to_number(aprm_seqnumberpaymentstatus(fp.status)) >= 40
                group by co.GrandTotal

auxiliaryInputs.name: ATTRIBUTESETINSTANCIABLE
auxiliaryInputs.code: @SQL=SELECT (CASE count(*) WHEN 0 THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) from M_ATTRIBUTESET mats join M_PRODUCT mp on mats.M_AttributeSet_ID=mp.M_AttributeSet_ID WHERE mp.M_PRODUCT_ID=@M_Product_ID@ and (mats.IsLot='Y' or mats.IsSerNo='Y' or mats.IsGuaranteeDate='Y')

auxiliaryInputs.name: DOCBASETYPE
auxiliaryInputs.code:
@SQL=select coalesce(max(dt.docbasetype), 'SOO') from c_order ord join c_doctype dt on (ord.c_doctypetarget_id = dt.c_doctype_id)
where ord.c_order_id = @c_order_id@

auxiliaryInputs.name: HASRELATEDSERVICE
auxiliaryInputs.code: @SQL=SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(1) = 1 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM C_ORDERLINE_SERVICERELATION WHERE C_ORDERLINE_RELATED_ID =  @C_ORDERLINE_ID@)

auxiliaryInputs.name: HASSECONDUOM
auxiliaryInputs.code: @SQL=SELECT (CASE COUNT(*) WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS TOTAL FROM M_PRODUCT_UOM WHERE M_PRODUCT_ID=@M_Product_ID@ AND ISACTIVE='Y'

auxiliaryInputs.name: LINKEDTOPRODUCT
auxiliaryInputs.code: @SQL=SELECT CASE WHEN PRODUCTTYPE = 'S' AND ISLINKEDTOPRODUCT = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END FROM M_PRODUCT WHERE M_PRODUCT_ID = @M_PRODUCT_ID@

auxiliaryInputs.name: Parent_AD_Org
UsesAlternate
auxiliaryInputs.code: @SQL=SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(C_TAX_ID)>0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS ISUSED FROM C_TAX WHERE C_TAX_ISMEMBER(@C_TAX_ID@, C_TAX_ID)=1 AND BASEAMOUNT IN ('TBA', 'TBATAX')

auxiliaryInputs.name: DOCBASETYPE
auxiliaryInputs.code:
@SQL=select coalesce(max(dt.docbasetype), 'SOO') from c_orderline_acctdimension olacct 
                           join c_orderline ol on (olacct.c_orderline_id=ol.c_orderline_id)
                           join c_order ord on (ol.c_order_id=ord.c_order_id)
                           join c_doctype dt on (ord.c_doctypetarget_id = dt.c_doctype_id)
                          where ord.c_order_id = @c_order_id@

preconditions.errorMessage: Order must be in Draft or In Progress status to complete
Order must have at least one line
Business partner must have a currency configured before completion

steps.name: validateDocAction
steps.description: Validate the requested document action (CO, VO, RE) is valid for the current document status

operation.errorMessage: Invalid document action for current status

behavioral.postcondition: Only valid status transitions are accepted

steps.name: executePreProcessHooks
steps.description: Run pre-process hooks registered for the order document action

behavioral.postcondition: All registered pre-process hooks have executed successfully

steps.name: reserveOrReleaseStock
steps.description: On Complete: reserve stock for each line. On Void: release reserved stock. On Reactivate: release reserved stock.

behavioral.postcondition: Stock reservations reflect the new order status

steps.name: updateDocumentStatus
steps.description: Set docStatus and docAction based on the completed action (CO/VO/RE transitions)

behavioral.postcondition: Order status reflects the completed action

sideEffects.change: set to Y on CO/VO, N on RE

steps.name: executePostProcessHooks
steps.description: Run post-process hooks registered for the order document action

behavioral.postcondition: All registered post-process hooks have executed successfully

edgeCases.description: Complete an order with no lines
edgeCases.setup: Order in DR status with zero lines

edgeCases.description: Void an order that is still in Draft status
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Validation fails with INVALID_DOC_ACTION — only CO orders can be voided

edgeCases.setup: Order in DR status, attempt Reactivate
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Validation fails — order is already in draft, cannot reactivate

edgeCases.description: Complete an order when business partner has no currency
edgeCases.setup: Order in DR status, BP with null currency
Order in DR status with lines; stock reservation fails on line 2 of 3
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Entire transaction rolls back — no partial reservations, status unchanged

preconditions.errorMessage: Order must be completed before adding a payment
Order must have a positive grand total
Business partner must have a payment method configured

steps.name: validatePaymentData
steps.description: Validate payment amount, payment method, and financial account are provided and consistent

operation.errorMessage: Payment data is incomplete or invalid

behavioral.postcondition: Payment input data has been validated

steps.name: resolvePaymentSchedule
steps.description: Locate the payment schedule details for the order and allocate the payment amount across them

behavioral.postcondition: Payment amount is distributed across outstanding schedule details

steps.name: createPaymentRecord
steps.description: Create FIN_Payment and FIN_PaymentDetail records linked to the allocated schedule details

behavioral.postcondition: Payment record exists with correct amount and linked detail lines

steps.name: handleOverpayment
steps.description: If payment amount exceeds outstanding balance, create credit/refund GL item allocation

behavioral.postcondition: Overpayment amount is allocated as credit or refund

edgeCases.description: Add payment to a draft (uncompleted) order
Payment amount exceeds order grand total (overpayment)
edgeCases.setup: Completed order with grandTotal=100, payment amount=150
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Payment is created; excess 50 is allocated as credit to the business partner

edgeCases.description: Payment when no financial account is available for the payment method
edgeCases.setup: Completed order, payment method has no linked financial account
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Validation fails — cannot process payment without a financial account

preconditions.errorMessage: Target order must be in Draft status to copy lines into it
At least one source order must be selected

steps.name: validateSourceOrders
steps.description: Verify all selected source orders exist and are accessible

operation.errorMessage: One or more source orders not found or not accessible

behavioral.postcondition: All source orders are valid and accessible

steps.name: copyLinesFromSources
steps.description: Iterate over each source order and copy its lines to the target order, applying hook-based transformations for product, quantity, attributes, prices, and taxes

behavioral.postcondition: Target order contains copies of all source lines with correct prices and taxes

sideEffects.change: one new line per source line

steps.name: explodeBomProducts
steps.description: For any copied line with a non-stocked BOM product, replace it with its component lines

behavioral.postcondition: BOM products are expanded into individual component lines

sideEffects.change: BOM line replaced by component lines

steps.name: recalculateOrderTotals
steps.description: Recalculate the target order header totals after all lines have been copied

behavioral.postcondition: Order header totals reflect all copied lines

edgeCases.description: Copy lines into a completed order

edgeCases.setup: Draft target order, empty sourceOrderIds array

edgeCases.description: Source order contains a non-stocked BOM product
edgeCases.setup: Source order with a BOM product line (3 components), target order is draft
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: BOM line is exploded into 3 component lines on the target order

edgeCases.description: Copy from multiple source orders simultaneously
edgeCases.setup: Two source orders with 2 lines each, draft target order
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Target order receives 4 new lines, totals recalculated

preconditions.errorMessage: Order must be processed (completed or voided) before posting
User must have Show Accounting preference enabled

steps.name: validatePostingEligibility
steps.description: Verify the order is processed and not already posted (for post action) or is posted (for unpost action)

operation.errorMessage: Order posting state does not match the requested action

behavioral.postcondition: Order is eligible for the requested post/unpost action

steps.name: generateOrReverseGlEntries
steps.description: Post: generate GL journal entries via ActionButtonUtility. Unpost: reverse existing entries via resetAccounting.

behavioral.postcondition: GL entries are created (post) or reversed (unpost)

steps.name: updatePostedFlag
steps.description: Set the posted flag on the order to Y (posted) or N (unposted)

behavioral.postcondition: Order posted flag reflects the completed action

edgeCases.description: Post an order that is not yet processed

edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Validation fails with POST_INVALID_STATE — order is already posted

edgeCases.description: Unpost an order that was never posted
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Validation fails with POST_INVALID_STATE — cannot unpost an unposted order

edgeCases.setup: Completed order, accounting configuration is incomplete (missing accounts)
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Entire transaction rolls back — no partial GL entries, posted flag unchanged
